subject: [PATCH v8 14/15] selftests/mm: add userfaultfd RWP tests

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch adds userfaultfd read-write-protect (RWP) tests to the Linux kernel selftests suite. The tests cover various scenarios, including async and sync modes, page mapping, mprotect, GUP walks, and fork operations. They verify that RWP permissions are correctly restored after closing the uffd or forking a new process. The patch also includes tests for invalid register mode combinations. The goal is to ensure that the userfaultfd API behaves correctly in different scenarios.
